infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GridPoint uses the camera to show AR bearing and distance to your target location.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GridPoint uses your location to calculate distance and bearing to target coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GridPoint uses your location to calculate distance and bearing to target coordinates.

plugins.cameraPermission: GridPoint uses the camera for AR bearing display.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GridPoint uses location to calculate bearing and distance.
